title: Shared definitions for blemeesd/1 wire frames
description: Reusable $defs referenced by the per-frame schemas. Not a frame schema itself.

SessionId.description: Client-owned session identifier. Opaque; the daemon does not validate format.

RequestId.description: Opaque correlation id set by the client on request frames; echoed on the reply.

Seq.description: Monotonic per-session sequence number injected by the daemon on session-stream frames.

PeerPid.description: Peer PID captured via SO_PEERCRED; may be absent on platforms that do not expose it.

items.description: Claude Code content block (text/image/etc.). Schema is intentionally permissive so new block types pass through.

ClaudeUserMessage.description: Native Claude Code user-turn message. Forwarded verbatim to `claude -p`'s stream-json stdin.

SessionSummary.description: One row in a blemeesd.sessions reply.
